LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF FIRST REHABILITATION SPECIALISTS, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $112,875.73. FURTHER, DEFENDANT CONVALESCENT CENTER DID NOT FILE A SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SEEK ISSUANCE OF WRIT THROUGH THE CLERK'S OFFICE. JUDGE JOSEPH M. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action To Los Angeles County Superior Court And For Payment By Plaintiffs Counsel Of Defendants Expenses And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CONVALESCENT CENTER MISSION ST., INC, MERIDIAN HEALTH SERVICES HOLDINGS, INC., MERIDIAN HEALTH SERVICES HOLDING, LLC, JAMES PRIEMESBERGER AND FORESIGHT MANAGEMENT SERVICES LLC'S Motion To Transfer Action To Los Angeles County Superior Court And For Payment By Plaintiffs Counsel Of Defendants Expenses And Attorneys Fees - The motion is denied. The court's reading of the amended complaint is that Mr. Preimesberger is being sued solely as an alter ego. The alter ego allegations/theory of recovery defeat defendant Preimesberger's right to have the case adjudicated at the county of his residence. See Lebatschi v. Sup. Crt. (1995) 33 Cal.App.4th 1465. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF FIRST REHABILITATION SPECIALISTS, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER and writ of attachment is granted in the amount of $112,875.73. The Declaration of Eric Guest establishes that the requirements of CCP secs. 483.010 and 484.090(a) are met. Further, Defendant Convalescent Center did not file a substantive opposition to the motion. Order signed. Prevailing party shall seek issuance of writ through the Clerk's Office. Judge Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/JMQ)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Continued To Jun-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF FIRST REHABILITATION SPECIALISTS, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is continued to June 29, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Parties must deliver courtesy copies of the papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 16, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
